title: Command Cockpit Quest Level Map
summary: Turned the Command Cockpit Overview Quest field into a compact in-stage level map so the selected lane reads more like a playable path without adding another panel.
changes: Added quest-field count metadata, a route-bed layer, and node socket markup to the existing Quest field.
Styled World, Level, Checkpoint, Gate, and Next cells as compact route nodes with a progress runner and subtle desktop stagger.
Flattened the mobile treatment so the route remains readable without clipping the narrow cockpit.
Recorded the change as the latest platform UI unlock in the generated snapshot history.
